allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import fastapi, telegram, redis, ollama, langchain, jinja2; print\('all deps installed'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import fastapi, telegram, redis, ollama, langchain, jinja2, langchain_redis, langchain_ollama; print\('all deps installed'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import socket; s=socket.create_connection\(\('localhost', 6379\), timeout=2\); s.close\(\); print\('redis OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:', d['info']['title']\); print\('paths:', list\(d['paths'].keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, State; Write-Host "---"; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List Id, ProcessName, Path)

PowerShell($pidsOnPort = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; Write-Host "PIDs to kill: $pidsOnPort"; foreach \($p in $pidsOnPort\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "killed $p" } catch { Write-Host "skip $p \(already gone\)" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "---after---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { $name = $p.ProcessName } else { $name = "DEAD" }; "$\($_.State\) PID=$\($_.OwningProcess\) Proc=$name" })

PowerShell(try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-NetTCPConnection -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction Stop; "removed" } catch { "Remove-NetTCPConnection failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "$\($_.LocalAddress\):$\($_.LocalPort\) PID=$\($_.OwningProcess\) Proc=$\(if\($p\){$p.ProcessName}else{'DEAD'}\)" })

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime,@{N='Cmd';E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(120,\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -Wrap)
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''bot.main|run_bots'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Stop-Process -Id 28460,31556 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''run_bots'\\'' -and $_.Name -eq '\\''python.exe'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''uvicorn.*web|run_web'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Stop-Process -Id 38920 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''uvicorn.*web'\\'' -and $_.Name -eq '\\''python.exe'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId | Format-Table')
